Name: TONICORP
Description: Tonicorp es una empresa de Arca Continental y The Coca Cola Company conformada por Toni, Topsy, Plásticos Ecuatorianos y Dipor. Comprometida con el desarrollo integral de sus colaboradores y su cadena de valor.

Name: Alpura
Description:
Grupo alpura es una empresa líder en el mercado de lácteos en México, fundada en 1972 por ganaderos con el compromiso de entregar la mejor leche fresca con calidad desde el origen. Actualmente, emplea a más de 17 mil colaboradores. En 2019, el catálogo alpura se conforma por más de 100 productos, entre los que se encuentran leches frescas, leches especializadas, la línea de yoghurt batIdo y bebible, cremas, leche evaporada, quesos, mantequilla, teniendo como objetivo satisfacer las necesidades de los consumidores con productos de alta calidad, que brinden la mejor nutrición y confianza. 
Alpura es la única empresa de lácteos en México certificada por la agencia gubernamental de Estados Unidos The Food and Drug Administration (FDA) gracias a los altos estándares de calidad internacional de sus productos. 
Para más información visite http://alpura.com | Facebook: @alpuraoficial | Twitter: @alpuraoficial | Youtube: Alpura Oficial

Name: PIL Andina S.A.
Description:
Pil Andina S.A. es la empresa del Grupo Gloria líder en alimentos en Bolivia. La central administrativa se encuentra ubicada en Cochabamba y cuenta con tres plantas industriales en la Paz, Cochabamba y Santa Cruz de la Sierra.

Actualmente fabrica y comercializa: leche pasteurizada, leche larga vida UHT, leche entera en polvo, yogurt, quesos, mantequilla, crema de leche, jugos y otros productos, bajo las marcas Pil, Bonlé, Pura Vida, Aruba y otras. Utiliza en la fabricación la mejor calidad de leche de las cuencas aledañas a las plantas.

Name: Betânia Lácteos
Description:
Nossa história se mistura com a de tantas famílias do Nordeste. 
O dia começa bem cedo, porque sabemos que há muito o que fazer. Na fazenda, a origem: o leite fresco, tirado, armazenado e preparado por mãos experientes de quem tem fé no trabalho. Famílias inteiras que fazem dessa produção seu sustento, sua morada, sua vida.
Do outro lado, o destino: o produto pronto, de qualidade, para quem valoriza sua origem. Famílias inteiras que apreciam leite de qualidade que dá força para suas rotinas e para todo o ecossistema de produção.
Em comum, a coragem de encarar mais um dia, o amor de pessoas que colocam suas famílias em primeiro lugar e a força para começar sempre tudo de novo.
Isso é o que alimenta, diariamente, nossos sonhos – que são do tamanho do horizonte. Cada um do seu jeito, vivemos cada dia para reforçar a confiança que é reconhecida por todas as famílias. Confiança de mãe.
Betânia Lácteos. Coragem que vem do leite.

Name: SanCor
Description:
SanCor es una cooperativa de productores lecheros argentinos que industrializa y comercializa productos lácteos que proveen nutrición y salud.
Es históricamente la principal exportadora de productos lácteos de Argentina.
Sus principales líneas de productos son leches infantiles, quesos, dulce de leche, manteca, crema, yogures, flanes, postres, leche en polvo y leches especiales.

Name: Hatsun Agro Product Ltd
Description: Hatsun Agro Product Limited has been committed to enriching the lives of customers by providing a range of high-quality dairy products. HAP manufactures and markets products that cater to both cooking and consumption, like milk, curd, ice creams, dairy whitener, skimmed milk powder, ghee, paneer and lots more. Our brands have become household names in over one million Indian houses. Arun Icecreams, Arokya Milk, Hatsun Curd, Hatsun Paneer, Hatsun Ghee, Hatsun Dairy Whitener, Ibaco and have become popular choices across the country. The Company exports its dairy ingredients to 38 countries in the American, Middle East and South East Asian Markets. The Company offers dairy extension services to farmers for the development and productivity of livestock. Our key focus is on delivering quality, and to that end, we have a technically advanced system that works in accordance with a time-tested business processes across our 16 plants.

Name: IGLOO Pakistan
Description:
Pakistan Dairy Products (Pvt.) Ltd “IGLOO” is among the pioneer frozen product manufacturers of Pakistan. The factory is located in the industrial zone of Karachi fully equipped with state of the art machinery. Working for more than 4 decades i.e. since 1974 IGLOO is serving the nation with unmatched range of ice lolly & many other frozen products. 

Having a distribution network that covers the whole of south region which includes Sindh and Balochistan, IGLOO distribute its products to retail outlets, hotels, restaurants, schools, colleges, cafeteria, catering services and other institutions. 

The ingredients selected for manufacturing are the finest from all around the globe. Under the brand name IGLOO, major segments of frozen products catered are: Bulk packs, impulse & Family packs. There are 30 different ice cream brands covering all age and income groups, while “King Cone” being the flag ship brand among them.

Name: Ipanema Queijos
Description:
Em 1982, a Queijos Ipanema foi fundada por uma tradicional família de laticinistas, que empregaram todo seu conhecimento e dedicação para criar queijos saborosos e de alta qualidade. Foi baseada nos princípios de respeito, tecnologia e inovação que a empresa se consolidou no mercado e há mais de três décadas oferece os melhores produtos para todos os perfis de consumidores e negócios. 

Por conseguinte, somos reconhecidos por aliar rígidos controles de qualidade, que começam na escolha das melhores matérias-primas, ao relacionamento transparente com clientes e consumidores. Nosso diferencial passa ainda por um sistemático aperfeiçoamento logístico e de processos, através do Centro de Distribuição em São Paulo e unidades produtoras em regiões estratégicas: São Paulo, Goiás e Mato Grosso.

Mas além de tudo isso, nosso maior motivo de orgulho é fazer parte da mesa de milhares de famílias brasileiras e valorizar os profissionais que nos ajudam a cumprir essa missão.

Name: Lactiangol - Lacticínios de Angola, S.A.
Description:
Como a primeira empresa láctea em Angola a produzir à escala industrial, a Lactiangol assumiu desde a sua fundação um papel essencial, garantindo aos Angolanos os melhores produtos lácteos Todos os nossos produtos são feitos com amor, em Luanda, e enviados para todo o país.

Somos uma empresa com mais de cento e cinquenta profissionais e colocamos amor no que fazemos. Trabalhamos em conjunto com clientes e distribuidores para concretizar a nossa visão de liderar a indústria de lacticínios no país, enquanto fortalecemos o sector lácteo de Angola no sentido de alcançar a auto-suficiência na produção de leite.

Estamos empenhados em liderar através da inovação, do fornecimento de alimentos nutritivos e essenciais e da promoção de uma vida saudável.

A Lactiangol também abraça todas as oportunidades de retribuir às nossas comunidades e contribuir para o bem-estar dos Angolanos e da nossa nação.

Name: Hoard's Dairyman
Description: On January 23, 1885, William Dempster Hoard wrote his issue of a "journal devoted to dairy farming." Today the insert has grown to be the dairy industry's leading dairy publication, Hoard's Dairyman. The publication helps readers run their businesses more effectively, because Hoard's Dairyman operates a dairy farm themselves and writes about their experiences. The farm is home to the largest and longest continually registered Guernsey herd in the United States. The farm expanded, and added Jerseys in late 2009 and robotic milking units in 2019.

Name: Lactalis International
Description:
Since its creation in France in 1933 by André Besnier, the Lactalis Group has remained faithful to its original commitment to dairy processing.

For more than 20 years, Lactalis International has been developing the positions of the Lactalis Group in Asia, in Africa, in the Middle East and in the French Overseas Territories.

With more than 350 coworkers based in our headquarters in France at Choisy-le-Roi and also abroad in more than 10 locations, we provide a range of more than 2 000 products, covering all the dairy product categories (milk, butter, cream, cheeses, dairy desserts), to all distribution networks, with the same objective: to meet at its best the needs of our customers.

The Lactalis Group draws its success from a strategy that is respectful to a strong dairy expertise, maintaining high quality and organoleptic standards for all products.

Each year, more than 17 000 containers are exported to more than 100 countries around the world by Lactalis International.

Name: Fonterra Brands Sri Lanka
Description: For 40 years, Fonterra Brands Sri Lanka has provided Sri Lankans with high quality dairy nutrition through a range of products, including Anchor. As a dairy co-operative owned by over 10,000 New Zealand farmers, we are also focused on sharing our expertise locally. Today we work indirectly with 100,000 people across the country through our network of business partners including traders, retailers, distributors, agents and farmers towards our purpose of making Sri Lanka a healthier, happier nation.

Name: Dairy Business Association
Description:
As the most effective lobbying organization for dairy farmers and business partners in Wisconsin, the Dairy Business Association ensures the interests of the dairy community are well represented in state and local government. Key to our mission is connecting with our communities and policymakers through advocacy, collaboration and continuous improvement. We work to foster a healthy business climate for dairy farmers and businesses, and serve as a dependable resource for members who face critical challenges. Our members are directly involved in our policy positions and lobbying efforts, and benefit from public relations, social media, education, networking and sustainability tools we provide. With our members, and for our members, we are building a trusted and vibrant dairy community that balances business, environmental and social responsibilities.

Follow us:
www.facebook.com/DairyForward
www.twitter.com/DairyForward
www.instagram.com/dairystrong

Name: PT Indolakto
Description: PT Indolakto is a subsidiary of Indofood. Indomilk is one of biggest brand in Indonesia. With the wide range of product makes PT Indolakto a Top 3 Dairy Industry in Indonesia

Name: Lactalis Heritage Dairy
Description:
Lactalis Group, the world leader in dairy, is a family-owned business with more than 85,000 pragmatic and ambitious professionals worldwide, committed to providing healthy and delicious dairy products that bring people together every day. At Lactalis, our core values of AMBITION, ENGAGEMENT, and SIMPLICITY are at the heart of everything we do.

If you’re looking for a unique experience with a company that offers strong brands, professional expertise, and a dynamic work environment that champions entrepreneurial spirt, hands-on responsibility and real opportunity for career development, we want to hear from you!

Lactalis Heritage Dairy: inviting you to share with us your STORY, your PASSION, and your EXPERTISE.

Name: Coopatos
Description: Uma das principais cooperativas do Brasil. Uma história de mais de meio século de muita dedicação e trabalho dos seus diretores, cooperados e funcionários.

Name: INALPI
Description:
Inalpi è un'industria leader nel settore lattiero-caseario. 

Dal 1966 produce sulla base di valori giusti, buoni e sicuri utilizzando latte piemontese interamente proveniente da una filiera corta e certificata, fondata su principi cardine come qualità, benessere animale e sostenibilità.

Lo stabilimento è situato all'interno dell'area MaB (Man and Biosphere), tutelata dall'UNESCO come biosfera del Monviso.

Inalpi offre un ampio assortimento di prodotti: Latte in polvere, Burro e Panna per utilizzo professionale; oltre a Burro, Fettine di formaggio fuso, Formaggini e Yogurt acquistabili online e nelle principali catene di supermercati. 

Inalpi redige ogni anno il proprio bilancio sociale; il testo integrale è consultabile sul sito web.

Name: BouMatic
Description:
We provide innovative solutions that help dairy farmers be more profitable, while safeguarding animal welfare.
Founded on a strong heritage of innovation and technical leadership, we deliver the future of productivity to dairy farms across the globe. Based on generations of experience, global R&D expertise and an intimate knowledge of the needs of local dairy businesses, our solutions answer tomorrow’s challenges.

www.BouMatic.com

Name: Afimilk Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1977, afimilk Ltd. (S.A.E. Afikim) has become a global leader in developing, manufacturing and marketing advanced computerized systems for the modern dairy farm, and for herd management. The company , since its inception, has been a leader through innovation: afimilk  introduced the world’s first electronic milk meter more than 30 years ago, the first pedometer to monitor cows, the first dairy farm management software and the first online milk analyzer (AfiLab). These tools have enabled farm managers to improve performance and maximize efficiency, ultimately increasing profits.
afimilk systems and products are in use worldwide. The company is active in more than 50 countries: thousands of farms, hundreds of thousands of milk meters, millions of pedometers.

Solutions
afimilk leading product line, is an automated modular system for intensive dairy farm management. The fully integrated software program, AfiFarm, collects information about each animal, builds a database and generates reports. This gives the farmer real-time information about herd health, milk quality and other critical factors, and enables well-informed decision-making.

Name: FrieslandCampina Professional
Description:
At FrieslandCampina Professional, our mission is to nourish the heroes of food – proud, passionate food professionals – to create exceptional experiences for your customers. We understand the evolving market and challenges faced by food professionals. That's why we have a dedicated team of specialists who have the passion for, and deep knowledge on the use of dairy and dairy alternatives in the food and beverage industry. We wholeheartedly commit ourselves to sharing our capabilities, experiences, market insights and collaboration with you for innovative solutions to achieve joint success. 
 
Within our portfolio, you'll find an array of renowned brands including Debic, Lattiz, Kievit, Black & White, Royal Hollandia and Valess, each embodying our commitment to service experience and product excellence. Additionally, our portfolio offers high-performance ingredients and innovative solutions that meet our industrial customers’ needs. With our broad range of ingredients and cross-disciplinary team of experts, we can help overcome whatever challenges you face.  
 
Through our collaborative approach and innovative solutions, we aim to become your trusted partner. Let's inspire and elevate the culinary world together.

Name: Pelwatte Dairy Industries Limited
Description:
Pelwatte Dairy Industries Ltd is a proudly Sri Lankan company committed to achieving national self-sufficiency in dairy. Since our establishment in 2006 in Buttala, we have worked to uplift local dairy farmers, ensure food security, and deliver high-quality, affordable dairy products to consumers across the country.

Our mission goes beyond business. By supporting rural dairy farming and investing in advanced production technologies, we empower communities, generate sustainable livelihoods, and contribute to Sri Lanka’s economic development.

We are an ISO 22000:2018 certified company, upholding international standards in food safety and quality. Our manufacturing process integrates advanced Danish technology, ensuring consistency, nutrition, and trust in every product that carries the Pelwatte name.

In addition to dairy, we are expanding into coconut-based products cultivated on our 17-acre land in Sri Lanka’s Coconut Triangle—furthering our commitment to natural goodness, diversification, and sustainable agriculture.

Pelwatte is more than a dairy brand—it’s a movement for national progress, rural empowerment, and global standards. With every product, we aim to nourish people, uplift communities, and help build a stronger, self-reliant Sri Lanka.

Name: Kamaths Ourtimes Icecreams Pvt Ltd (Natural Ice Cream)
Description:
Established in 1984 in Mumbai, Natural ice cream has been pioneer in making artisan ice creams using only fruits, dry fruits, chocolates, milk and sugar. This idea was conceptualised by Mr. R S Kamath, CMD of Kamaths Ourtimes ice creams Pvt. Ltd.

With 30 years of being in the business, over 100 outlets across the country and the recently launched
state-of-the-art factory in Mumbai, Natural Ice Cream is still raring to go places. And it is the rare combination of traditional methods and modern technology that will take us there.

Name: Milma
Description: Well-known by the popular sobriquet ‘Milma’, Kerala Co-operative Milk Marketing Federation (KCMMF) was formed in 1980 as a state adjunct of the National Dairy Programme ‘Operation Flood’. It is a three-tiered organization. The farmer memberships that stood at 45000 during take over from the erstwhile KLD&MM Board during 1983 has grown to over 9.77 lakhs through 3315 milk Co-operatives by February 2019. These primary societies are grouped under three Regional Co-operative Milk Producers’ Unions viz TRCMPU for Thiruvananthapuram region, ERCMPU for Ernakulam region and MRCMPU for Malabar region. At the apex level KCMMF functions from the headquarters at Thiruvananthapuram. From the different units managed directly by KCMMF and the various units under regional unions MILMA produces and distributes pasteurized Vitamin – A enriched milk and various milk-based products as well as mango drink throughout the state. MILMA has been instrumental in achieving the national goal of self-sufficiency in milk production in the state.The goal of KCMMF is "The socio-economic progress of the dairy farmer through procuring, processing and marketing of milk". Still the goal is receding as Kerala enjoys one of the highest ranges of per capita milk consumption. KCMMF is totally content in the realization of this vision which was set before it. KCMMF has achieved the distinction in its performance by close association and bond with National Dairy Development Board, Animal Husbandry Department and Dairy Development Department of the State and Kerala Livestock Development Board. Kerala Co-operative Milk Marketing Federation (KCMMF), popularly called ‘Milma’ was established in April, 1980 with is head office at Thiruvananthapuram for the successful implementation of ‘Operation Flood’ Programme in Kerala.

Name: Manuka
Description:
Fue en el año 2005 cuando dos familias de productores neozelandeses admiraron el potencial lechero que tenía el sur de Chile, reuniendo un puñado de cualidades admirables: Un buen clima para la producción, una amplia disponibilidad de tierra, y una economía estable con orientación exportadora.

Actualmente ubicados en el corazón del sur de Chile somos la empresa de producción de leche más grande del país. Contamos con 13.458 hectáreas de praderas permanentes y 5.130 hectáreas de bosque nativo dentro de la región de Los Ríos y Los Lagos.

Nuestro modelo productivo trabaja con la naturaleza, pero requiere de mucha habilidad, entrenamiento y eficiencia para implementarlo en forma correcta, es por eso que somos expertos en nuestra área de trabajo, lo que se evidencia en que nuestra producción representa el 10% del total nacional, con más de 180 millones de litros de leche producidos al año.

Para fortalecer el rubro lechero, Manuka participa en la creación de Fundación Tres Hojas, para brindar capacitaciones a las personas que quieran ahondar en sus conocimientos de producción y manejo. 

Te invitamos a visitar su web http://www.fundaciontreshojas.cl
Location: Puerto Octay, Región de los Lagos

Name: Madhusudan
Description: In 1991, Madhusudan, one of India’s leading dairy brands established its first milk plant (SMC Foods Limited) at Nanauta village in the Saharanpur district. Buoyed by the success, the company came up with its second milk plant (Creamy Foods Limited) at Bartoli village (in Khurja town) in Bulandshahar district. Situated in the heart of North India in the state of Uttar Pradesh, the two milk plants cater to a huge market base and have transformed the life of milk producers in these regions.

Name: SAFILAIT
Description: Safilait est une S.a.r.l. de Production Agroalimentaire Situé a Constantine et Spécialisées dans les Produits Laitiers et Dérivés, Sa gamme riche et variée lui confère l’estime de ses consommateurs.

Name: Whyte Farms
Description: Farm Fresh Milk & Dairy produce

Name: Koukakis Farm S.A.
Description:
"Φτιάχνουμε κάτι περισσότερο από ένα γάλα για τα παιδιά μας. Σας προσφέρουμε το γάλα, που πίναμε εμείς παιδιά”
Θανάσης Κουκάκης.

Κάτω Απόστολοι, Κιλκίς.
Εδώ, βρίσκονται οι εγκαταστάσεις της Φάρμα Κουκάκη ενταγμένες απόλυτα στο φυσικό περιβάλλον. Στην πεδιάδα του Κιλκίς, δίπλα στον εύφορο ποταμό Αξιό. Εδώ, όπου οι δικοί μας άνθρωποι συλλέγουν καθημερινά φρέσκο ελληνικό γάλα και παράγουν γαλακτοκομικά προϊόντα ημέρας, δίνοντας έμφαση στη γεύση και την ποιότητα. Διαχρονικά.
Τα προϊόντα μας διακρίνονται για την άριστη ποιότητα τους, αφού όλα παρασκευάζονται με αγνό, ολόφρεσκο, 100% ελληνικό γάλα, με εξαιρετικά αυστηρές προδιαγραφές.

Name: IndiaDairy.com
Description:
Since 1983, Dairy India is known for providing authentic information about the dairy sector of India. Founded and conceived with the encouragement and support of Dr Verghese Kurien, the doyen of Indian dairying, by the late P.R. Gupta and Late Sharad Gupta, Dairy India has evolved into one of the world’s most prestigious publications on dairying across the world.

With the changing times Dairy India has launched IndiaDairy.com.

IndiaDairy.Com is an all round dairy guide for you and is most popular because we provide a dairy database for your marketing and sales team.

IndiaDairy.Com is designed keeping in mind that you can cater to your dairy target audience as only people who are related to the dairy sector or are interested in the dairy sector visit our website.

This only dairy portal aims to make our close-knit dairy community even closer. Dairy information from all over India will be easily accessible to its members in their laptop, tablet, and phone on the go.

Name: Letti A²
Description: Nossa missão é produzir alimentos frescos e seguros, sempre por meio do respeito à terra, ao bem-estar animal e às pessoas.

Name: Laticínio Saboroso
Description:
Nascemos para alimentar e criar oportunidade!

Em 1995 um Jovem produtor rural Sr. Antonio Alves de Toledo aos 32 anos de idade, apoiado pela jovem e também empreendedora Cássia de 29 anos,  se viu em uma situação complicada com seu pequeno rebanho de vacas leiteiras com um produção próxima de 500 litros por dia, quando a Gigante Nestlé, abandonou a compra de leite de pequenos produtores em sua região Palestina - SP.

Como sua propriedade estava direcionada a produção de leite entendeu que era o momento de fazer do limão uma doce limonada! já que seus 3 filhos     (de 12, 9, 6 anos ) ainda estavam no inicio de sua caminhada, Levantou recurso e montou um mini usina de beneficiamento de leite pasteurizado com alinhada a potencial de consumo de sua cidade os 500 litros/dia.                                                    Em menos de 1 ano os pequenos produtores de leite de sua região já estavam vendendo o leite para o pequeno laticínio, para não deixar a atividade desaparecer na região e dar condição, dar corpo ao novo negócio foi de encontro a novas oportunidades de escoar uma capitação maior

Hoje com 25 anos de historia, atuam na região noroeste do estado de São Paulo com planos de buscar o atendimento estadual até 2023 e Nacional na fase seguinte. 

Depois de muito esforço seu reconhecimento por onde passa com produtos e serviço tem gerado grandes impactos positivos, isso Graças a forte Time de profissionais que vem formando orientados ao desenvolvimento sustentável e coletivo.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Associated Milk Producers Inc.
Description:
At AMPI, we make the dairy products that make some of the nation’s top brands. We know what we’re made of is just as important as what we make. Our core values -- commitment to quality, responsibility to others and determination to succeed -- guide us in all we do.

More than 1,050 employees help move the milk produced on Upper Midwest member dairy farms to customers across the U.S. and around the world. We do this with a manufacturing network that processes milk into dairy products for retail, foodservice and food ingredient customers. AMPI employees touch all facets of the food chain, from the farm to the market.

We're farmer-owned and Co-op Crafted, and our dairy cooperative reflects the values and commitment for which the Midwest is famous. AMPI offers rewarding jobs in a variety of fields, including manufacturing, accounting, communications, marketing, information services, supply chain and more.

Job positions will be posted as they become available. We'd love to have you join our team!

Name: Dairy Campus
Description:
Dairy Campus in Leeuwarden is hét onderzoek- en praktijkcentrum voor de melkveehouderij en de zuivelketen. Alles draait hier om innovatie, onderzoek en educatie. Hiermee zijn we uniek in de wereld. Onze onderzoekers uit verschillende disciplines werken samen met het bedrijfsleven, onderwijs en de melkveehouders. Wetenschap en praktijk zitten hier onder één dak. Alle activiteiten zijn gericht op de ontwikkeling van een duurzame zuivelketen. 
De koeien produceren op Dairy Campus data én melk.

Name: AGROS, U.C.R.L.
Description:
MISSÃO
A AGROS, U.C.R.L. tem como missão promover o escoamento do leite produzido pelos Produtores, sócios das Cooperativas agrupadas, fomentando a melhoria contínua da qualidade do mesmo, satisfazendo o seu cliente e criando valor aos Produtores através da negociação que garanta o melhor preço.

VISÃO
Continuar a ser reconhecida como uma empresa credível, dinâmica e inovadora, assumindo a liderança do Movimento Cooperativo Agrícola, de forma a projetar e contribuir para que as novas gerações de Produtores usufruam de um desenvolvimento económico, social e cultural, equilibrado e sustentável.

VALORES
Ética e Deontologia
Valorização Humana – respeito mútuo, formação adequada e trabalho em equipa
Melhoria Contínua – rigor, disciplina, desempenho, inovação
Satisfação dos Stakeholders 
Gestão Responsável, Transparente e Sustentável

Name: 荷兰皇家菲仕兰 FrieslandCampina China
Description:
On January 1st, 2016, FrieslandCampina Business Group China was officially established to be one of the five business groups (the others being Cheese, Butter and Milk Powder, Ingredients, Consumer Products Asia and Consumer Products Europe, Middle East and Africa). Among the seven key investment areas in updated Route2020, four directly related to China, including strenthening China market, high value-added ingredients, cheese business and e-commerce IFT. More resources will be directed to China and with our joint efforts, FrieslandCampina China will be a company with over 10 billion revenue by 2020!

FrieslandCampina China has five business units: FrieslandCampina Dairy Products (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., FrieslandCampina Trading (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., FrieslancCampina Ingredients (Beijing) Co., Ltd. FrieslancCampina Ingredients (Shanghai) Co., Ltd., FrieslandCampina Brand Management (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. and the joint venture FrieslandCampina Huishan Dairy Co., Ltd.

Name: Lancewood
Description:
Founded in 1996, Lancewood produces a range of cheese and dairy products that have rightly earned an excellent reputation for superior quality and flavour. Lancewood’s state of the art manufacturing facility is strategically situated in George in close proximity to the local farms ensuring milk is delivered with the minimum delay.

Only the finest milk is sourced from these farms where free range cows graze in lush green pastures of the Garden Route. Lancewood embraces a culture of innovation in order to continually meet the changing requirements of today’s discerning consumers.

Name: Cooperativa de Laticínios de São José dos Campos - Cooper
Description:
Com 86 anos de existência, a empresa lidera o mercado de leite pasteurizado nas regiões em que atua, graças aos investimentos em tecnologia e em qualidade.

Desde a sua inauguração em 1935, foram anos e anos de luta, crescimento e modernização para que a Cooper pudesse enfrentar a globalização da economia, adequar sua estrutura à realidade do mercado e se transformar no que é hoje: uma empresa forte, presente em 31 municípios, com um parque industrial moderno, atividades diversificadas e um serviço de marketing capaz de dar sustentabilidade à marca. 

Como empresa, a Cooperativa persegue a competitividade, a produtividade e a qualidade dos seus produtos. Para isto, investe no treinamento de seus funcionários, na melhoria constante da estrutura da empresa, no lançamento de novas opções para o consumidor e no rígido controle de qualidade desde a matéria-prima até o produto final.

Name: Diario Lechero
Description: Diario Lechero nació como aporte a la difusión de información especializada acerca de esta importante actividad y motor de la economía del sur de Chile.

Name: Agri-Mark, Inc.
Description:
Agri-Mark farmers take pride in their Cabot, McCadam, and Agri-Mark products and have the toughest milk quality standards in the market. If you enjoy healthy, delicious, award-winning dairy products, you can count on the fact that the pride of both our farmers and our employees are vital ingredients in everything we make.

When you buy Cabot, McCadam, and Agri-Mark dairy products, you are directly supporting more than one third of the dairy farm families in New England! 

History
Agri-Mark's rich tradition as a cooperative dates back to 1916 with the formation of its predecessor, the New England Milk Producers Association. The cooperative flourished during the twentieth century and in 1980 became Agri-Mark. A dozen years later Agri-Mark merged with Cabot Creamery Cooperative, thereby ensuring that Northeast dairy farmers would continue their ownership of a valuable, time-honored consumer brand -- Cabot. Naturally aged Vermont cheddar cheese and fresh creamery butter top the list of Cabot's best known products. In 2003, Agri-Mark merged with the Chateaugay Cooperative in Upstate New York and acquired the assets of McCadam Cheese, including a plant located in Chateaugay. McCadam manufactures award-winning New York Cheddar, Muenster and European-type cheeses.

Name: Vitalus Nutrition Inc
Description:
Vitalus is a global brand providing specialized dairy ingredients for use in a wide variety of food and beverage applications. We have grown from a small family owned business to a trusted supplier of ingredients for large scale processor and top- tier brands. 
We source milk from regional farms. Artificial growth hormones, like rbST, are not permitted and controlled measures are in place to prevent antibiotics from entering the milk supply. All production facilities meet the highest quality Food Safety Standards (FSSC22000) and all of our ingredients are Kosher and Halal certified.

Name: Clínica do Leite
Description: No Laboratório da Clínica do Leite são realizados diversos tipos de análises no leite cru. Essas análises permitem obter informações sobre a qualidade do leite de tanques de resfriamento das fazendas, de silos nas indústrias e nos tanques dos caminhões transportadores. Além dessas, são feitas análises no leite individual de vacas para se avaliar a nutrição, a prenhes e a presença de mastite. Com isso o produtor poderá melhorar seus processos produtivos para conseguir mais sucesso e a indústria estará atendendo as exigências do MAPA com o mínimo de esforço, garantia de qualidade e de excelente atendimento.

Name: Dairy UK
Description: Dairy UK is the trade association for the UK dairy supply chain and brings together processors, dairy co-operatives, manufacturers, farmers and bottled milk buyers throughout the country. This supply chain approach is unique within the global dairy industry. Between them, Dairy UK's members collect and process about 85% of UK milk production and Dairy UK is committed to promoting and protecting the interests of the sector in the UK and abroad. The dairy industry is a success story and is vital to the UK economy, environment and diet. Thanks to an 80,000-strong workforce, it provides wholesome, affordable and nutritious foods to consumers while investing constantly in research and innovation.

Name: OMFED
Description:
The Orissa State Cooperative Milk Producers' Federation Limited (OMFED) is an apex level Dairy Cooperative Society registered under Cooperative Society Act – 1962. It has come into existence to integrate the milk producers in rural areas with consumers in the urban areas with an enterprising aptitude.

OMFED's main activities includes promoting, production, procurement, processing and marketing of milk & milk products for economic development of the rural farming community in Orissa.

Name: Yashili NZ Dairy Company Limited
Description: Yashili is one of the leading infant formula producers for the domestic market in china. With one simple goal – to produce the highest quality infant formula and raise the healthiest babies – Yashili came to New Zealand in July 2012 and established a world leading manufacturing base in Pokeno.

Name: Produco: Food Safety & Regulatory Compliance Specialists
Description:
Produco provides expert Food Safety, Quality, and Regulatory Compliance advice and consultancy services to Dairy and Food manufacturers throughout New Zealand and Australia.

We have extensive experience across all regulatory aspects, ensuring your products are compliant with regulatory requirements. 

We create, develop and implement Risk Management Programmes and world-class Quality Management Systems to ensure the safe manufacture of food and dairy products and to facilitate export.

We'll assist you to implement the necessary legal requirements for your unique food business such as Animal Products Act and Food Act via regulatory interpretation, process and procedural development, implementation, and training to ensure you and your staff are compliant.

We have extensive experience getting product across borders via compliance with OMARs (Overseas Market Access Requirements) and ICRs (Importing Country Requirements).

We facilitate communication with Regulatory Bodies and understand how they operate, thereby expediting your products to gain the required official assurances to most overseas countries. 

Team: 
A range of highly skilled consultants ranging from Senior QA Managers, Specialists and QA Officers are available dependent on your needs. 
- Part-time / Full-time 
- Long, Medium & Short term 
- On-site or Remote 
- Variable hours

We service all regions and cities throughout New Zealand and Australia. Our delivery can be via e-mail, phone, video conference and travel to your premises.

Name: The Dairy Alliance
Description: On behalf of dairy farm families, The Dairy Alliance works with schools, health professionals, retailers, dairy processors and the public to promote dairy products throughout Alabama, Georgia, Kentucky, Mississippi, North Carolina, South Carolina, Tennessee and Virginia.

Name: Kurtsan Milking Systems & Farm Equipment
Description:
Founded in 1985, Kurtsan is a company which produces milking machines, dairy technologies and farming equipments headquartered in İstanbul, Turkey. Kurtsan is a family company and offers products in over 70 countries and  services at 269 destinations in Turkey.  With 160 employees and 32,000 m² indoor factory, Kurtsan is standing as the biggest production facility of milking machines in Turkey.  

In the factory of Kurtsan, there are head offices, stainless steel process center, plastic injection center, molding center, painting center, welding center, mounting center and quality department.

Since 1985, Kurtsan produced 275,000 mobile milking machines, installed over 800 farms in Turkey and 50 farms in different countries.
